# Kernal Automation - SI Dept. (Full Product Guide)

> Professional PLC training kits and control cabinets for schools, labs, and enterprise training centers.

## About

Kernal Automation Co., Ltd. - System Integration Department sells pre-wired, ready-to-use PLC training kits.
We ship to 50+ countries via DHL/FedEx (5-7 days express). All kits include a 1-year warranty.

- Company: Kernal Automation Co., Ltd.
- Location: Dongguan, Guangdong, China
- Contact: Peggy Chan - peggy@kernal-automation.com | WhatsApp: +86 176 1205 1841
- Website: https://plc-training-kits.tech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kernal-automation-co-limited/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@PeggyinKernal

## Products

### Siemens S7-1200 + V20 VFD Training Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/siemens/
- Price: $1,150 USD
- SKU: S7-1200-VFD-KIT
- Description: Complete range of Siemens S7-1200 PLC training kits for communication, PID control, motion control, pneumatic systems, and VFD integration.
- Audience: Vocational schools, university automation labs, enterprise training centers, and self-learners preparing for Siemens PLC certification.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

### S7-1200 Communication Training Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/mitsubishi/
- Price: $720 USD
- SKU: S7-1200-COMM-KIT
- Description: Complete range of Mitsubishi FX5U PLC training kits for motor control, communication, PID control, motion control, and pneumatic systems.
- Audience: Intermediate to advanced students studying industrial networking, PROFINET, and remote I/O systems.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

### S7-1211C Temperature PID Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/allen-bradley/
- Price: $580 USD
- SKU: S7-1211C-PID-KIT
- Description: Complete range of Allen-Bradley PLC training kits for Micro850 and MicroLogix platforms. PID control, VFD integration, communication, and pneumatic systems.
- Audience: Students learning process control fundamentals, PID tuning, and analog signal handling.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

### S7-1215C 2-Axis Motion Kit
- URL: https://plc-training-kits.tech/products/cabinets/
- Price: $1,880 USD
- SKU: S7-1215C-MOTION-KIT
- Description: Compact control cabinets for motor control and process control training. DOL starters, star-delta starters, PID temperature control, and liquid level control.
- Audience: Advanced students and engineers learning multi-axis motion control, interpolation, and positioning systems.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

- SKU: S7-1200-PNEUMATIC-KIT

- Audience: Students learning pneumatic automation, sequencing logic, and PLC-controlled pneumatic systems.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

- Price: $580 USD
- SKU: CABINET-VFD-WATER
- Description: Shows communication paths between two PLCs and a touchscreen while supporting switch control, analog acquisition, logic interlock, and array display exercises.
- Audience: Students learning VFD operation in water supply and pump control applications.
- Includes: Pre-wired hardware, user manual, wiring diagrams, training videos, 1-year warranty

## Services

- PLC Programming: Siemens TIA Portal, Mitsubishi GX Works 3, AB CCW, HMI Design
- Automation Software: Licensed Siemens/Mitsubishi software sales
- Custom Kit Design: Curriculum-matched, component customization, bulk orders
